properties.media:imagetext:
SAFETY
INFORMATION
- SINGAPORE AIRLINES
TAKE OFF &
LANDING
Bags that cannot fit into overhead compartments or under seats
will be stowed in the cargo hold. Please remove spare lithium
batteries and valuables from these bags.
AT ALL TIMES DURING
THE FLIGHT
Keep seatbelts fastened when seated
Fasten
Tighten
INFANT SEAT BELTS ARE AVAILABLE
Please check with cabin crew
Unfasten
Take care when opening
overhead compartments
No Smoking
including e-cigarettes
SMOKING
IN THE
TOILET
SETS OFF
THE SMOKE
ALARM
DURING TURBULENCE
Remain in your seats with seatbelts fastened, even when in bed mode.
Remove infants from bassinets and secure with infant seatbelts.
Toilets must not be used.
DO NOT REMOVE THIS CARD FROM AIRCRAFT
It is a chargeable offence not to obey safety instructions
trom our crew, or to remove or tamper with the satety
equipment on board the aircraft.
A330-300
EXPLANATION OF SYMBOLS
EXIT
Landing on
ground
Landing
on water
Fasten
seat belt
No
smoking
Emergency
exit
Do not take
baggage
Remove high
heel shoes
Stow large
PED
Switch off
lightweight PED
Oxygen
Taxi-out
Take-off
Cruise
Landing
Taxi-in
PORTABLE ELECTRONIC DEVICES (PEDs)
USAGE
• The use of large PEDs (such as laptops and notebooks) and DVD
players is not permitted during taxi (for departure & arrival), take-off
and landing. They must be switched off or put in Flight Safe/Airplane
mode. They must also be stowed
• The use of low power consumption PEDs such as heart pacemaker,
hearing aids, digital watches is permitted for all phases of flights.
• Please refer to the information below on the usage of
lightweight PEDs such as mobile phones and tablets.
They must not be connected to peripheral devices
(such as keyboards, earphones etc.), in-seat power
supply outlets or the USB/HDMI ports of the Inflight
Entertainment System during taxi, take off and landing.
• Charging is only permitted during cruise and for PEDs
equipped with original manufacturer's equipment (OEM) batteries.
Use the in-seat power supply or USB port to charge PEDs. Do not
cover PEDs with a blanket or pillow or place them inside the seat
pocket. Do not leave PEDs unattended while charging.
Flight
Phase
Permitted PED Mode
Note
Flight Safe
Operational reasons and/or
local law may prohibit the
use of PEDs. Where such
conditions exist, all PEDs
must be switched off.
Please follow the instructions
of the crew.
Bluetooth
Flight Safe
The use of PEDs with the
transmitting functions (Wi-Fi
and/or GSM) enabled is
permitted only in aircraft with
Inflight Connectivity activated.
Youl
GS/Cellular
Wi-Fi
Local law may prohibit the
use of PEDs during taxi-in.
Where such conditions exist,
all PEDs must be switched off.
Please follow the instructions
of the crew.
Bluetooth
Flight Safe
A STAR ALLIANCE MEMBER
SINGAPORE AIRLINES
A great way to fly
